case_title: ARREDONDO MARY CRUZ VS KWONG WAI IND DBA LAUNDROMAT CLEANERS

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KWONG WAI IND DBA LAUNDROMAT CLEANERS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARREDONDO MARY CRUZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KWONG WAI IND DBA LAUNDROMAT CLEANERS $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $208.00, PLT.MAY KEEP POSSESSION OF THE LEATHER JACKET STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY ARREDONDO MARY CRUZ AS TO DEFENDANT KWONG WAI IND DBA LAUNDROMAT CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
